---
name: Add a project
about: Track adding a new repo to the portfolio
title: "Add project: <repo-name>"
labels: ["project"]
---

**Repo:** https://github.com/danieldevelopes-collab/<repo>

- [ ] `npm run sync` picked it up (or added the entry manually)
- [ ] tagline + summary written
- [ ] screenshot(s) committed to the source repo's `docs/`
- [ ] "how it works" / "how to run" filled in
- [ ] `live` block added if it runs in a browser
- [ ] `npm run build && npm run validate` passes
